description: Creates a Log row. ShortMessage truncated to 1500 chars. dataObject serialized to JSON. IP address and page URL captured from HttpContext if logLevel > Information. Three implementations: DB (DefaultLogger), ApplicationInsights, Email (FinalEmailLogger on Fatal).
name: InsertLog
signature: ISystemLogger.InsertLog(logLevel, shortMessage, fullMessage, user, module, dataObject)
trigger: Exception handling, service operations, error boundaries throughout codebase.

description: Middleware intercepts every HTTP request. Captures path, method, query, payload body, response body, status code, duration. Controlled by AppSetting RequestLogLevel(160). Only writes if 'All' (everything) or 'Error' (only non-2xx responses).
name: RequestResponseLogging
trigger: Every HTTP request. Gated by AppSetting.

description: DelegatingHandler injected into all HttpClient instances. Captures URL, method, request body, response body, status code, duration ms for every outbound call. Writes OutgoingRequestLog rows.
name: OutgoingHttpLogging
trigger: Any external HTTP call (SendGrid, GatewayAPI, Infobip, KRR, KoFuVi, Datafordeler, etc.)

description: Specialized outbound log for Norwegian API calls. Captures per-request identifier (CPR/address key) for billing compliance. Written separately from OutgoingRequestLogs.
name: NorwegianApiLogging
trigger: KRR lookup, KoFuVi lookup, Maskinporten-authenticated calls.

description: Records map tile render requests per profile. Used by billing system to quantify map API usage.
name: MapRequestLogging

description: Writes ImpersonationLog row when SuperAdmin begins impersonating a user. Records both admin (impersonating) and target (impersonated) user IDs.
name: ImpersonationAudit

description: FinalEmailLogger detects Fatal-level log entry and sends email to configured admin address via IEmailService.
name: FatalErrorEmailAlert
